name: visual-hive
description: Deterministic-first visual QA and testing orchestration for web projects.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @visual-hive/core && npm run build -w @visual-hive/github-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/llm-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/playwright-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/core && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/github-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/llm-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/playwright-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/cli && npm run typecheck -w demo-react-app
scripts.demo:all: npm run demo:build && npm run demo:doctor && npm run demo:plan && npm run demo:run && npm run demo:mutate && npm run demo:triage && npm run demo:report
